title: sorbus rufoferruginea var. trilocularis
intro: Sorbus rufoferruginea var. trilocularis, also known as the Chinese Mountain Ash or Sorbus, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sorbus rufoferruginea var. trilocularis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Sorbus rufoferruginea var. trilocularis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate various health conditions.
